notes: Bug confirmed: At 375px viewport, document.body.scrollWidth=437 vs clientWidth=375, overflow of 62px causing horizontal scrollbar. Root cause: navbar right container (365px) + left container (32px) + gaps exceed 375px viewport. Search button (89px) not hidden on mobile (missing hidden md:flex class). GitHub Stars button (184px) also not hidden on mobile. All three issues cause horizontal overflow.
